name: morevibe
description: Personal vibe-coding harness that helps LLMs maintain sources, canon, and wiki layers consistently.

interface.shortDescription: A personal harness for better vibe coding.
interface.longDescription: MoreVibe helps LLM agents maintain a reusable project harness with clear source, canon, and wiki boundaries so context compounds across sessions.
defaultPrompt: Set up MoreVibe for this project.
Ingest these docs into MoreVibe canon and wiki.
Lint the MoreVibe wiki for drift and gaps.
